task_completion.description: Verify that the PDB structure 1C3W is loaded into PyMOL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL viewer shows a 3D protein structure, and the object panel on the right lists '1C3W' or a similarly named object.

task_completion.description: Verify that the protein is shown as a cartoon, and the retinal chromophore (RET), Lys216, Asp85, Asp212, and Arg82 are displayed as sticks with heteroatom coloring.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main protein backbone is rendered as a cartoon. Specific residues in the active site (a long chain for retinal, and surrounding amino acids) are rendered as stick models with distinct colors for oxygen (red) and nitrogen (blue).

task_completion.description: Verify that a distance measurement is created between the Schiff base nitrogen of Lys216 and a side-chain oxygen of Asp85.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashed line representing a measurement is visible between the nitrogen atom (blue) of the Lys216-retinal linkage and an oxygen atom (red) of Asp85, with a label showing a value around 3.79 A.

task_completion.description: Verify that a distance measurement is created between the Schiff base nitrogen of Lys216 and a side-chain oxygen of Asp212.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashed line representing a measurement is visible between the nitrogen atom (blue) of the Lys216-retinal linkage and an oxygen atom (red) of Asp212, with a label showing a value around 3.74 A.

task_completion.description: Verify that the visualization is saved as a PNG file to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/br_proton_wire.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL command line or terminal shows a 'png' command saving to the specified path, or a file manager/terminal shows the created image file in the correct directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that a text report is created containing the PDB ID, analyzed residues, and the two measured distances.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output shows the contents of /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/br_pathway_report.txt. The text must include '1C3W', mention the residues 'Lys216, Asp85, Asp212, Arg82', and list the two measured distances.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used PyMOL to load the structure and make measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the PyMOL GUI open with the 3D structure and measurement lines visible, not just a script or text file.

integrity.description: Ensure the distance measurements were actually performed in the software and not just hallucinated.
integrity.visual_evidence: The PyMOL viewer should show the measurement objects (e.g., dist01, dist02) in the right-hand object panel and dashed lines in the 3D view.

integrity.description: Ensure the values written in the text report match the measurements shown in the PyMOL GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distance values in the text editor (report) should be identical to the labels on the dashed measurement lines in PyMOL.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct distance from the Lys216 Schiff base nitrogen (NZ) to the closest side-chain oxygen of Asp85 is approximately 3.79 Angstroms (acceptable range: 3.5 - 4.8 A). The correct distance from the Lys216 Schiff base nitrogen (NZ) to the closest side-chain oxygen of Asp212 is approximately 3.74 Angstroms (acceptable range: 3.0 - 4.5 A).
